title: DMSRDE Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
org: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE)
shortInfo: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on the official website drdo.gov.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced through the DMSRDE Paid Internship Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 27 years of age who are pursuing final year Graduate/Post Graduate in Engineering and Science from a recognized Indian University/Institute are eligible to apply for these Paid Internship vacancies. The application process for DMSRDE Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 15 June 2026. Cand

basic_details.job_title: DMSRDE Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE)
basic_details.short_information: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on the official website drdo.gov.in. age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: Below 28 Years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Pursuing final year Graduate/Post Graduate in Engineering and Science, full time Course in the respective discipline from a recognized Indian University/Institute
qualification.details: Computer Science Engineering/Information Technology/Artificial Intelligence/Computer Engineering: Pursuing final year B.Tech/M.Tech in respective discipline from recognized Indian University/Institute. Chemical Engineering/Polymer Science & Technology/Materials Science Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Textile Engineering: Pursuing final year B.Tech/M.Tech in respective discipline from recognized Indian University/Institute. Chemistry/Material Science/Textile: Pursuing final year M.Sc. in respective discipline from recognized Indian University/Institute.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Computer Science Engineering/Information Technology/Artificial Intelligence/Computer Engineering
Chemical Engineering/Polymer Science & Technology/Materials Science Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Textile Engineering

selection_process: CGPA/Online interview/Interaction Merit basis Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMSRDE Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMSRDE Paid Internship posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the DMSRDE Paid Internship posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Paid Internship position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be pursuing their final year of a full-time Graduate or Post Graduate course in Engineering and Science from a recognized Indian University or Institute to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the DMSRDE Paid Internship recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Paid Internship position is 27 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered for the Paid Internship role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000/- per month for the duration of their Internship with DMSRDE.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DMSRDE Paid Internship positions?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You must download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Paid Internship post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for the Paid Internship position at Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the DMSRDE Paid Internship recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves evaluation based on CGPA, followed by an online interview or interaction. Merit and document verification will also be part of the process.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the DMSRDE Paid Internship posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DMSRDE Paid Internship recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q9. Where is DMSRDE located?
faq.answer: Defence Materials & Stores Research & Development Establishment (DMSRDE) is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208013.

faq.question: Q10. When will the selected students be intimated and when does the Internship start?
faq.answer: Selected students will be intimated by 30th June 2026, and the internship is scheduled to commence on 13th July 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DMSRDE Paid Internship posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the DMSRDE Paid Internship posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.
